top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.TagName = 'r' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_r_posts
FROM posts p
JOIN tags t ON p.Tags LIKE '%' || t.TagName || '%'
WHERE p.PostTypeId = 1; -- 1 indicates questions/posts, not answers

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.TagName = 'r' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS r_language_percentage
FROM posts p
JOIN postLinks pl ON p.Id = pl.PostId
JOIN tags t ON pl.RelatedPostId = t.Id
WHERE p.OwnerUserId IN (
    SELECT Id FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'Community'
);

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.TagName = 'r' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_r_posts
FROM posts p
JOIN tags t ON p.Tags LIKE '%' || t.TagName || '%'
WHERE p.PostTypeId = 1; -- 1 indicates questions/posts, not answers

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.TagName = 'r' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS r_language_percentage
FROM posts p
JOIN postLinks pl ON p.Id = pl.PostId
JOIN tags t ON pl.RelatedPostId = t.Id
WHERE p.OwnerUserId IN (
    SELECT Id FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'Community'
);

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(p.Tags, 'r') > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_r_posts
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Community' 
  AND p.PostTypeId = 1;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.TagName = 'r' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_r_posts
FROM posts p
JOIN tags t ON p.Tags LIKE '%' || t.TagName || '%'
WHERE p.PostTypeId = 1; -- 1 indicates questions/posts, not answers

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.TagName = 'r' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS r_language_percentage
FROM posts p
JOIN postLinks pl ON p.Id = pl.PostId
JOIN tags t ON pl.RelatedPostId = t.Id
WHERE p.OwnerUserId IN (
    SELECT Id FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'Community'
);

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN INSTR(p.Tags, 'r') > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_r_posts
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Community' 
  AND p.PostTypeId = 1;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.TagName = 'r' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_r_posts
FROM posts p
JOIN tags t ON p.Tags LIKE '%' || t.TagName || '%'
WHERE p.PostTypeId = 1; -- 1 indicates questions/posts, not answers
